news.summary: Invalda INVL has entered into option contracts with employees of its subsidiaries where it holds a 50% or more stake, pertaining to 24,008 ordinary registered shares of Invalda INVL. This action aligns with the Equity Incentives regulations and the decision made during the Annual General Meeting on April 30, 2025. Come 2028, as per the terms specified in the option contracts, the employees are set to receive 24,008 shares of Invalda INVL at no cost, each valued at EUR 0.29. In case the company distributes dividends or distributes free funds per share before the share issuance in 2028, the share quantity will be adjusted by adding shares based on an approved formula by the shareholders meeting on April 30, 2025. This adjustment safeguards that the fundamental economic rationale of the share acquisition agreement remains intact.
news.headline: Invalda INVL signed stock option contracts for 24,008 shares with employees, following annual meeting resolution. Employees get shares for free in 2028.

news.summary: Some of the largest US banking companies are reportedly considering collaborating to launch a crypto stablecoin. JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citigroup, and Wells Fargo, along with other institutions like Early Warning Services and Clearing House, are discussing a potential partnership. The regulatory environment and demand for stablecoins will influence the final decision. The US Senate advanced discussion on stablecoin regulation with the GENIUS Act, addressing collateralization and AML compliance. The market capitalization of stablecoins has risen to $245 billion from $205 billion at the start of the year, indicating a 20% increase. Yield-bearing stablecoins now account for nearly 4.5% of the stablecoin market. Critics, including high-ranking Democrats, are concerned about potential personal benefits for President Trump through favorable stablecoin regulation, as his family's platform launched the USD1 stablecoin in March. The American banking lobby is reportedly concerned about stablecoins disrupting traditional banking models. Tech giant Meta is also looking into integrating stablecoin payments.
news.headline: US big banks consider joint stablecoin with Senate support amid rising demand, with market cap at $245B from $205B.

news.summary: Anthropic has launched its latest chatbot models, Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4, claiming them to be the most powerful and superior coding models globally. Both models offer near-instant responses and deeper reasoning functionalities, with Claude Opus 4 outperforming competitors in agentic coding benchmarks and achieving a 72.5% score on software engineering benchmark, surpassing OpenAI's GPT-4.1's 54.6% score. The AI industry is shifting towards 'reasoning models,' with major players like OpenAI and Google adopting this approach. However, Anthropic's new chatbot feature of reporting users to authorities for immoral behavior in testing environments has sparked controversy and backlash, prompting concerns over privacy and ethics. Sam Bowman, an Anthropic AI alignment researcher, clarified that this feature only operates in specific testing environments with unusual access and instructions. Emad Mostaque, CEO of Stability AI, criticized this behavior as a betrayal of trust.
news.headline: Anthropic launches new AI models Claude Opus 4 & Claude Sonnet 4, claimed as world's best, with high benchmarks. Controversy over whistleblowing feature reported. CEO condemns as a betrayal of trust. AI industry shifts to reasoning models; key players pivoting. Source: Anthropic & Sam Bowman.
Bekaert announces progress in share buyback and liquidity agreement program.

news.headline: Protests against 'Crypto Corruption' at Trump's meme coin dinner draw over 100 demonstrators at Virginia club.

news.summary: Recurring EBITDA is calculated by adding the current operating income (EBIT) to depreciation and amortization of non-current assets, change in provisions (excluding provisions on current assets), and the share of profit of equity-method associates. This formula helps determine the company's recurring earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization.
news.headline: EXEL Industries reports strong results for first half of 2024–2025 with Recurring EBITDA formula for earnings calculation.

news.summary: Cybercriminals are using fake Ledger Live apps to steal cryptocurrencies from macOS users by tricking them into entering their seed phrase through malware, warns cybersecurity firm Moonlock. The malicious clone of Ledger Live has been found on at least 2,800 hacked websites. The malware, Atomic macOS Stealer, steals personal data and replaces the real Ledger Live app with a fake one that prompts users to enter their seed phrase. Once the phrase is entered, it is sent to attackers who empty the victims' wallets. Moonlock has been tracking this malware since August, with at least four active campaigns. Hackers are now offering malware with anti-Ledger features on the dark web, indicating the sophistication of these attacks. Moonlock advises users to only download Ledger Live from official sources, never share their seed phrases, and be cautious of any page requesting such information. Ledger has not yet commented on the situation. This poses a significant threat to cryptocurrency owners as hackers continue to exploit trust in Ledger Live.
news.headline: Hackers use fake Ledger Live app to steal seed phrases, draining crypto from Mac users. Malware found on 2,800 sites, active since August, with 4 campaigns. Moonlock warns against inputting seed phrase on fake sites, urges to download Ledger Live from official source. Ledger Live yet to comment. Hackers on dark web offering anti-Ledger malware. Moonlock: ongoing threat. Safety tips advised by cybersecurity experts. Magazine: AI discussion.

news.summary: US President Donald Trump hosted a secretive dinner for top memecoin buyers, including 220 largest holders of the Official Trump (TRUMP) token. The event at Trump National Golf Club featured a three-course meal and gift bags. Attendees included Tron CEO Justin Sun, Magic Eden CEO Jack Lu, and BitMart CEO Sheldon Xia. The menu included a Trump organic field green salad, filet mignon, pan-seared halibut, mashed potatoes, vegetable medley, and lava cake. Sun, the largest TRUMP token buyer, received a golden Trump-branded watch, valued at $100,000. Protesters outside accused Trump of profiting from the presidency, with signs calling for financial reform and impeachment. Trump-linked entities reportedly earned $100 million in TRUMP token trading fees, amid questions of conflict of interest and insider trading related to Trump's crypto ventures.
news.headline: Trump's memecoin dinner: 220 top holders treated to meal & gift bags as protesters accuse corruption. CEOs & $100,000 watch noted. Protests outside. $100M trading fees made. #TrumpCoin #CryptoDinner #Corruption.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 1.5% in the last quarter, reaching a record high of 10.2%. This surge in unemployment has been attributed to the ongoing economic downturn, with many businesses being forced to close due to the impact of the pandemic. Additionally, it was reported that a total of 1.2 million jobs were lost during this period. Experts are now calling for government intervention to help stimulate job growth and alleviate the financial strain on households.
news.headline: Cautious investors eye Poland's political landscape, anticipating impact on economy.

These alarming numbers highlight the continuing impact of the pandemic on communities worldwide and emphasize the importance of following safety protocols to prevent further spread of the virus.

news.summary: Several prominent banks in the United States are considering collaborating on a new stablecoin project as forthcoming laws create an opportunity to compete with the current leaders in the market, Circle and Tether. This potential venture has the potential to shake up the industry and could involve significant players in the banking sector. This move comes amidst efforts to leverage the increasing popularity of stablecoins and the evolving regulatory landscape. The collaboration could bring together substantial resources and expertise, posing a challenge to the existing stablecoin giants. Stay tuned for further updates on this development.
news.headline: Major US banks are exploring collaboration to challenge $245B stablecoin market dominance of Circle and Tether amid pending legislation.

This advancement allows users to incorporate third-party smart home devices into ConnectLife.
news.headline: Hisense integrates Google's Home APIs into ConnectLife app, allowing users to connect third-party smart home devices.

news.summary: Bitcoin futures open interest has reached record levels at over $80 billion on crypto derivatives exchanges. This is a 30% increase since the beginning of May, indicating a surging interest in betting on future Bitcoin prices. The high open interest suggests an increase in leveraged positions in the market, which can lead to forced liquidations and selling pressure. However, the surge in spot Bitcoin ETF inflows, totaling over $2.5 billion this week, could counter some of this extended leverage. Bitcoin options markets also show significant open interest, with over $1.5 billion at the $110,000 and $120,000 strike prices on Deribit exchange, and over $1 billion at strike prices of $115,000, $125,000, and $130,000. Approximately $2.76 billion worth of contracts are due to expire on May 23 with a max pain point of $103,000. Meanwhile, Bitcoin's price briefly slipped below $111,000 after hitting an all-time high of $112,000 on May 22 and has mostly been trading above $111,000. The asset has gained around 20% since the beginning of the year and almost 50% since its crash to $75,000 in April.
news.headline: Bitcoin's open interest at peak as BTC drops below $111K; futures OI hits $80B, up 30% since May; $2.5B ETF inflows counter leverage. Bitcoin options reach $1.5B at $110K and $120K strikes; $2.76B contracts due May 23.BTC briefly slips below $111K on Coinbase, up 20% in year and $50% since April 7 crash.

news.summary: The article discusses the importance of identifying promising crypto projects before they gain widespread attention, highlighting success stories like Solana, Arbitrum, Chainlink, and Pepe Coin. It emphasizes the need to analyze on-chain metrics, tokenomics, developer activity, and community traction to distinguish between potential winners and red-flag projects driven by hype. It provides tips on utilizing tools like Dune Analytics, Nansen, GitHub, LunarCrush, and Santiment to gauge project legitimacy and potential. The article also emphasizes the significance of tracking metrics like user growth, code commits, ecosystem activity, and liquidity build-up while being cautious of sudden spikes in social mentions, influencer spam, and anonymous teams making outrageous promises. Additionally, it warns against red flags like high holder concentration, unverified token contracts, lack of liquidity lock or audit, and impending large token unlocks. Lastly, the article advises investors to conduct thorough research and due diligence before making investment decisions in the volatile crypto market.
news.headline: Discover crypto winners early: Use metrics like onchain data, tokenomics, dev activity & community traction. Learn from projects like Solana & Chainlink. Don't fall for hype.

news.summary: On 23 May 2025, in Basel, a strategic partnership was revealed between Roche and Broad Clinical Labs. Roche, listed under SIX: RO, ROG and OTCQX: RHHBY, disclosed their collaboration to pioneer innovative solutions with Roche's latest next-generation sequencing (NGS) technology known as Sequencing By Expansion (SBX). The primary objective of this cooperation is to leverage SBX technology for revolutionizing clinical genomics and biomedical exploration. Additionally, the partners intend to integrate SBX technology into Broad Clinical Lab's services as a standard option for rapid and scalable sequencing within their research community.
news.headline: Roche collaborates with Broad Clinical Labs for SBX sequencing technology. Aims to revolutionize clinical genomics.

news.summary: LHV Pank has revised the equity research and price target for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (EFT1T) shares, maintaining the price target at 20 euros, approximately 5% higher than the recent closing price on the Tallinn Stock Exchange. The shares hold a "neutral" rating in the analysis. This update comes after the previous price target was established in February 2025.
news.headline: LHV Pank reiterated neutral rating for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS shares, with price target of 20 euros, 5% above last close.

news.summary: In HANOI, Vietnam, Vietnam Airlines recently announced a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with FPT, a leading global technology corporation. The agreement focuses on bolstering comprehensive strategic collaboration to advance digital transformation, boost operational capacities, and elevate customer satisfaction. As per the MOU, Vietnam Airlines and FPT will work together to develop and integrate an array of cutting-edge technology solutions such as Generative AI and Cloud Computing. This partnership aims to enhance the overall efficiency and innovation within the airline industry.
news.headline: Vietnam Airlines partners with FPT for digital aviation transformation, enhancing operations and customer experience via advanced technology solutions.

news.summary: In Basel on 23 May 2025, Roche disclosed results from the phase III STARGLO study's two-year follow-up. The data revealed a 40% enhancement in overall survival (OS) for patients who underwent treatment with Columvi® (glofitamab) paired with gemcitabine and oxaliplatin (GemOx), where OS was not reached. In comparison, patients on MabThera®/Rituxan® (rituximab) with GemOx (R-GemOx) had an OS of 13.5 months. These findings underscore the significant survival benefit of Columvi when used in a fixed-duration combination for individuals with relapsed or refractory (R/R) diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) who have had at least one prior line of therapy and are ineligible for autologous stem cell transplant (ASCT). The updated data will be presented at the 61st American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) during an oral session held from 30 May to 3 June 2025.
news.headline: Roche's Columvi improves overall survival by 40% in relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma patients, 24.7-month median follow-up reveals.
Nyrstar NV announces 2024 AGM scheduled for 24 June 2025.

news.summary: World (CRYPTO: WLD) surged to the top of the list of cryptocurrency gainers after securing a substantial $135 million for its network expansion. The token, which is associated with a decentralized identity verification project, experienced a remarkable 24% increase in value within 24 hours, hitting levels not witnessed since early February. This surge drove WLD's market capitalization to $2.37 billion, marking its highest point in more than five months. Trading volume also saw a significant boost, soaring 165% to $1.06 billion in the same 24-hour period. On-chain activity witnessed a spike, with large transactions exceeding $100,000 increasing by 62%, along with a 10.22% rise in daily active addresses based on data from IntoTheBlock. Furthermore, WLD's Open Interest surged by over 62% within the same timeframe.
news.headline: World Token's value surged by 24% after raising $135 million, hitting $2.37 billion market cap with $1.06 billion trading volume.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking the fastest growth since 1973. This growth is mainly driven by strong recoveries in major economies such as the United States and China. However, disparities remain as emerging markets and developing economies are projected to grow at a slower rate of 3.3%. In terms of inflation, the annual global consumer price inflation is expected to reach 3.2%, which is the highest level seen since 2008. These projections highlight the uneven economic recovery across different regions and the need for continued support to address the challenges faced by various countries.
news.headline: EVS postpones Extraordinary General Meeting to June 10, 2025 for shareholders.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. This decline translates to approximately 650,000 new job opportunities being created in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has seen a steady increase, with the main index rising by 3.5% to reach a new record high of 35,000 points. Economists are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting further growth and stability in the coming months.

news.summary: Major U.S. banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Citigroup, and Wells Fargo, are reportedly considering collaborating on launching a stablecoin tied to the U.S. dollar. The aim is to stay competitive in the face of rising challenges from the cryptocurrency sector. The proposal involves companies jointly owned by these banks, such as Early Warning Services and the Clearing House. The decision to move forward with this stablecoin will depend on various factors, including regulatory developments and market demand for such assets. This initiative reflects the banking industry's readiness for the potential widespread adoption of stablecoins. For the full details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Top U.S. banks considering joint stablecoin to counter crypto competition. JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citigroup, Wells Fargo discussing venture.

news.summary: An ongoing trial found that when ATG-037, an oral small molecule CD73 inhibitor, was combined with MSD's anti-PD-1 therapy, KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab), in patients with CPI-resistant melanoma, the treatment showed promising results. The overall response rate (ORR) was 36.4%, and the disease control rate (DCR) was 100%. This suggests a strong potential for this combination therapy in treating melanoma that has shown resistance to checkpoint inhibitors.
news.headline: Antengene to showcase clinical results from CPI-resistant solid tumors at ASCO 2025 with 36.4% ORR and 100% DCR in melanoma patients.

This collaboration, effective May 22, 2025, in Austin, Texas, will allow for seamless operations within the eCommerce sector. Ordoro, renowned for its eCommerce operations software, is at the forefront of this integration, aiming to enhance the efficiency of online businesses. This move is anticipated to positively impact a significant number of merchants and streamline their processes.
news.headline: Ordoro integrates with ReturnZap for streamlined returns. Helps merchants automate returns within eCommerce workflow.

news.summary: During the 2025 National Adult and Influenza Immunization Summit (NAIIS), VaxCare, a top care delivery platform for vaccines, shared findings from a recent study. The research, which reviewed close to 850,000 administrations, validated the success of co-administration strategies, highlighting their effectiveness in immunization practices.
news.headline: VaxCare showcases co-administration strategy results at NAIIS with study of 850,000 administrations, confirming effectiveness.

The rise in high-end condominium sales contrasted with the upward trend in more affordable housing purchases, reflecting a diverse real estate market in Miami-Dade County. The figures indicate a strong real estate market in the county, with transactions in different price ranges showing growth and stability.
news.headline: Miami-Dade County sees a surge in $1M+ condo sales, doubling pre-pandemic numbers, with affordable condos also on the rise.
